statement: The Stage 3B formal cross-check estimator recorded matched DEU and native log-evidence-style values under the scoped full-objective likelihood configuration.
required_caveat: Use as an internal formal cross-check estimator result, not as a final publication-grade evidence claim.

statement: The formal cross-check log-BF-style value is positive for DEU relative to native under the matched scoped estimator lineage.
required_caveat: Do not phrase this as model superiority or decisive external evidence.

statement: The DEU formal cross-check log-evidence-style value was recorded.
required_caveat: The estimator lineage and prior-volume assumptions must accompany the value.

statement: The native formal cross-check log-evidence-style value was recorded.
required_caveat: The native baseline must be described as matched to the scoped full-objective likelihood and excluded TT_lite.

statement: A formal cross-check evidence estimator has been run as part of an internal validation workflow.
required_caveat: External/publication-grade claims require independent validation before model-superiority language.
